description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Within conventional palletizers, filter to models running 40–60 cases per minute with a footprint of up to 12 m², then request a quote for the fastest option that meets these criteria and fill out the quote form using the provided company and production details.

tasks.instruction: In robotic palletizers, filter to models priced at or below $150,000 with payload capacity of at least 50 kg, compare the first two filtered results, then add to your quote list the one with the higher payload that still meets the budget filter.
tasks.name: In robotic palletizers, filter to models priced at or below $150,000 with payload capacity of at least 50 kg, compare the first two filtered results, then add to your quote list the one with the higher payload that still meets the budget filter.

tasks.instruction: Use the support downloads section to search for model AP-4000, filter to operator manuals, and open the English operator manual PDF for that model.

tasks.instruction: In spare parts, filter to items compatible with model RP-300 that have ratings of 4 stars and up and prices up to $300 each, then add the first three distinct parts from the lowest-priced results (quantity 1 each) to the cart and ensure the total remains at or below an $800 budget.

target_names: Safety Scanner Reflector Pack for RP-300 Cell

tasks.instruction: From the services area, request an on-site demo, select a robotic palletizer as the equipment type, choose a specific mid-August 2026 date as the preferred demo date, and submit the form with the given company and beverage line project details.

tasks.instruction: Use the ROI calculator for a scenario that replaces multiple operators with automation, then open the related sales inquiry form and submit a message that explicitly includes the calculated payback period along with a note that it is an ROI calculation for replacing 4 operators.

tasks.instruction: Using the service center locator, search within 200 miles of ZIP code 30301, select the center with the smallest distance, then submit a service request for model CP-2500 including the machine model, a brief issue description, a specific September 2026 visit date, and contact details while keeping that center as the preferred location.

tasks.instruction: From the Beverage & Bottling industry page, view recommended palletizing systems, filter to solutions that handle 18–25 pallets per hour with total system price at or below $250,000, then add the highest-throughput qualifying system as a complete bundle (including palletizer, infeed conveyor, and safety fencing) to your quote and label the quote for a 20 pallets/hour beverage project.

tasks.instruction: In the case studies section, filter to Food & Beverage projects using robotic palletizers from 2023 onward, open the first study that mentions frozen food or frozen meals, then submit a 'Talk to an Expert' form whose project description contains that case study title followed by a note requesting a similar project.

target_names: Robotic Palletizing for Frozen Meals Doubles Throughput at Northstar Foods

expected_values.case_study_title: Robotic Palletizing for Frozen Meals Doubles Throughput at Northstar Foods
